# holistics_shareable_link (Resource)

A public shareable link to a Holistics Dashboard.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Public link — no password, no expiry.
resource "holistics_shareable_link" "public" {
  resource_type = "Dashboard"
  resource_id   = 1234
  title         = "Public revenue dashboard"
}

# Password-protected with an expiry date — useful for investor or board access.
resource "holistics_shareable_link" "investors" {
  resource_type    = "Dashboard"
  resource_id      = 1234
  title            = "Q4 investor view"
  password_enabled = true
  password         = "share-with-care-only"
  expired_at       = "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z"
}

# Row-level filtered view — recipients only see rows where region = "EU".
# Useful for sharing a dashboard with an external partner while restricting
# the data they can see.
resource "holistics_shareable_link" "eu_partner" {
  resource_type = "Dashboard"
  resource_id   = 1234
  title         = "EU-only partner view"

  permission_rules = {
    row_based = [
      {
        field_path = { field_name = "region" }
        condition = {
          operator = "is"
          values   = ["EU"]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

# Filtered link — preset a dynamic filter so the link always shows a specific slice.
resource "holistics_shareable_link" "this_quarter" {
  resource_type = "Dashboard"
  resource_id   = 1234
  title         = "This quarter's view"

  dynamic_filter_presets = [
    {
      dynamic_filter_id = "2002"
      preset_condition = {
        operator = "is"
        values   = ["last_90_days"]
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (Number) ID of the resource to share.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type to share. Currently only `Dashboard`.

### Optional

- `dynamic_filter_presets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets))
- `expired_at` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password to access the link (only set when password_enabled is true).
- `password_enabled` (Boolean)
- `permission_rules` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules))
- `title` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Shareable link ID.

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets`

Required:

- `dynamic_filter_id` (String) Dynamic filter ID (numeric or string).
- `preset_condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition))

Optional:

- `public_hidden` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_filter_presets--preset_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_filter_presets.preset_condition`

Required:

- `operator` (String)

Optional:

- `modifier` (String)
- `values` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_rules`

Optional:

- `row_based` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based))

<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_rules.row_based`

Required:

- `condition` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based--condition))
- `field_path` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based--field_path))

<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_rules.row_based.condition`

Required:

- `operator` (String)

Optional:

- `modifier` (String)
- `values` (List of String)


<a id="nestedatt--permission_rules--row_based--field_path"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permission_rules.row_based.field_path`

Required:

- `field_name` (String)

Optional:

- `data_set_id` (Number)
- `is_metric` (Boolean)
- `model_id` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a shareable link by its ID (a string token returned at creation).
terraform import holistics_shareable_link.public_dashboard abc123def456
```
